author: Vinayak Gautham
object_id: registry, dependency_graph, docs/rule-lifecycle, docs/confidence-model, docs/conflict-resolver, docs/rule-authoring-guide
summary: Added five missing architectural modules required for 10,000-rule scalability: Repository Index (operating system — all registries), Dependency Graph (impact analysis when law changes), Rule Lifecycle (7-stage quality gate), Confidence Model (evidence-completeness-based decision confidence), Conflict Resolver (formalized evidence conflict resolution), and Rule Authoring Guide (self-sufficient contributor guide). Updated ARCHITECTURE.md sections 10–15. Updated README.
notes: This commit does not add tax rules. It strengthens the infrastructure that makes 10,000 rules maintainable.
